src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the Generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Add import for CRLFLogConverter to support safe logging markers.
Refactor log message string concatenation to use Java 13+ text blocks for better readability.
Handle empty active profiles by falling back to default profiles in the log message.
Add a Spring profile condition to exclude the AsyncConfiguration bean from loading during specific test profiles.
Refactor Hazelcast MapConfig creation to use the new addMapConfig API instead of the deprecated put method on MapConfigs.
Refactor Hazelcast MapConfig creation for domain maps to use the new addMapConfig API.
Update MapConfig instantiation to pass the map name via constructor instead of relying on implicit naming or subsequent setters.
Update domain MapConfig instantiation to pass the map name pattern via constructor.
Wrap single string argument in an array for @EnableJpaRepositories annotation.
Remove ProblemModule and ConstraintViolationProblemModule beans as they are no longer needed or supported in this configuration.
Reorder method parameters to place the custom @LiquibaseDataSource ObjectProvider after LiquibaseProperties.
Add @Configuration annotation to the security configuration class.
Remove unused imports and dependencies related to the old security configuration (e.g., CorsFilter, SecurityProblemSupport, AjaxHandlers).
Add new imports required for the Spring Security 6 configuration (e.g., SecurityFilterChain, AntPathRequestMatcher).
Refactor constructor to remove dependencies on CorsFilter and SecurityProblemSupport.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.before: public SecurityConfiguration(..., CorsFilter corsFilter, SecurityProblemSupport problemSupport)

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove bean definitions for AjaxAuthenticationSuccessHandler, AjaxAuthenticationFailureHandler, and AjaxLogoutSuccessHandler.
Update logout success handler to use HttpStatusReturningLogoutSuccessHandler instead of custom AjaxLogoutSuccessHandler.
Add new request matchers for static assets and API documentation in the authorization configuration.
Add SpaWebFilter and CookieCsrfFilter to the security filter chain.
Update Content Security Policy to use dynamic configuration from JHipsterProperties.
Change frame options from deny to sameOrigin to support H2 console and other embedded resources.
Add CSRF token request handler to handle CSRF tokens correctly in modern Spring Security.
Ignore OPTIONS requests and static resources in WebSecurity configuration (moved to HttpSecurity or removed).
Refactor static resource location and path mappings to use file extensions and broader classpath roots.
